name: Window Items
desc: Sends the full contents of an inventory window — all slots at once. Used for initial container opening and rejected transaction recovery.

fields.name: items
fields.desc: Array of all ItemStacks in the window, slot by slot

notes: For windowId=0, this updates the entire player inventory (45 slots: 9 hotbar + 36 main). For chests, this is sent immediately after S2DPacketOpenWindow. When a C0E click is rejected (S32 accepted=false), the server re-sends S30 to force the client to revert its inventory.

implementation.overview: S30PacketWindowItems sends the FULL contents of a container — all ItemStacks in order. This is used for initial container sync (after S2D open), full inventory resync (after rejected transaction), and dimension change. RektSky B5 ChestStealer intercepts S30 in silent mode to fill the silent chest container with the current items. InventoryManager modules read S30 to analyze the current state of the container for sorting/stealing decisions.

modules.name: ChestStealer Silent Items (RektSky B5)
modules.purpose: Intercept S30PacketWindowItems to fill the silent chest container with items for analysis. In silent mode, the chest GUI is never shown but S30 carries the full item list which the module reads to determine what to steal.
modules.how_it_works: After S2D is cancelled (silent mode), S30 arrives with all chest item stacks. The module matches the windowId to the stored silent container, fills the container slots via putStacksInSlots(), and cancels the packet (preventing vanilla handler from processing it). The item list is then used by the stealer loop to shift-click items out.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleWindowItems(S30PacketWindowItems) — fills the container's slots. For windowId=0 (player inv), fills all 45 slots. Cancelling prevents the container from being updated.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: Cancelling S30 causes the client inventory to not update. If the server re-sends S30 after a rejected transaction (S32 accepted=false), cancelling S30 means the client keeps its (incorrect) inventory state — which leads to further transaction rejections. Silent ChestStealer cancels S30 to prevent GUI display but still reads the items for its own processing.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleWindowItems(S30PacketWindowItems) — fills container slots. RektSky B5 ChestStealer cancels in silent mode. InventoryManager modules read items for sorting/stealing.

Server: Sent after S2D (initial container open) and after S32 rejected (inventory revert).
implementation.client_variations:
RektSky B5: ChestStealer cancels S30 in silent mode to fill silent container.
Rise 6.0: ChestStealer reads S30 items for stealing.
Sigma 4.11: InventoryManager reads S30 for inventory state.
Tenacity 6.0: ChestStealer detects S30 to start auto-steal.
Jigsaw 0.26: Vanilla handler only.
Aqua 13: EventPacket fires for S30.
